title: Eva Store header images changed
wikitext:
[]: Eva Store header images changed [No Spoilers??]             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 30, 2010 11:44 am Instead of having 1.0-related header images, it now* features 2.0 header images . Hurray! (I marked the topic "No spoilers?" because Eva Store itself has TONS of spoiler-related goods on there, so yeah. Tread with caution.) The images featured are: Shinji at Kaji's melon patch, Asuka in Eva-02, Mari at school, Bardi--er, the 9th Angel at sunset, and crows on some electric poles. Basically, stuff that was in the trailers and promo materials before the film was out. The side image layout that shows "live feed" (it used to show NGE/EoE images and was changed to 1.0 images awhile ago) still shows 1.0 images instead of anything from 2.0. *I have no idea when the change occurred (when I checked last month, there was still 1.0 images everywhere), though according to Fazmotron it was a week or so back.

[]:             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Fri Apr 30, 2010 1:30 pm I checked less than a week ago and it was still 1.0 pictures.
